_meta.doc: Declarative anomaly rules. Each block maps a detector's signals to a severity + a routing target. The scheduler re-reads this on every sweep, so you can tune thresholds without a restart. Whether a detector actually runs is decided by config.js -> detectors (or the WATCH_ENABLED env var); the `enabled` flag here is only the fallback when neither is set.

signals.note: Error rate well above the rolling baseline — usually a regression from the last deploy.
